name: google-earth-p0824-restore
description: Restore /mnt/nav/gemmi to the pre-deploy state saved by google-earth-p0824-deploy. SD-card only; does not touch firmware.
author: dspl1236
notes: Restores the previous /mnt/nav/gemmi tree if a backup exists
If the deploy created /mnt/nav/gemmi from nothing, restore removes it again
Validated against the matching google-earth-p0824-deploy workflow on a US RNS-850.
uninstall: Use this restore card before removing helper scripts with build_sd.py --uninstall.
